name: 银座高级酒店门外
location: Ginza district, Tokyo, Japan, outside the entrance of a luxury hotel
layout: Compact urban facade with a sleek glass entrance door flanked by polished stone pillars; marble steps leading up to revolving doors; adjacent sidewalk lined with manicured planters and subtle LED signage; narrow alleyway visible to the side with discreet service access; overall tight, upscale street-level composition emphasizing verticality and refined enclosure
materials: Polished black granite facade with reflective glass panels; brushed stainless steel door frames and handles; textured marble steps with subtle veining; frosted glass accents on signage; nearby asphalt sidewalk with embedded lighting strips; potted evergreens in ceramic containers
lighting: Soft neon glow from hotel signage in cool blues and whites; warm amber spill from lobby windows through tinted glass; street lamps casting elongated shadows on the pavement; subtle uplighting on pillars highlighting stone textures; overall low-key illumination with high contrast edges
atmosphere: Elegant yet tense urban night vibe; crisp air with hints of city exhaust and floral notes from planters; reflective surfaces capturing distant city lights; sense of exclusivity and subtle surveillance through clean, unadorned lines
establishing_prompt: Empty nighttime exterior of a luxury hotel in Ginza, Tokyo: sleek glass revolving doors with polished granite pillars under soft neon signage glow, marble steps leading to the entrance, manicured planters on the sidewalk, subtle street lighting casting shadows on the pavement, no people or vehicles, high-detail realistic render for cinematic reference
